appAlert.title: Alert Banner
appAlert.description: Show a persistent warning banner at the top of every page for all users.
appAlert.showAlertDescription: When enabled, the message below is shown to all users on every page.
appAlert.messagePlaceholder: e.g. We are currently investigating a service disruption.
appAlert.loadError: Failed to load the alert banner configuration.

toast.updateError: Failed to update the alert banner.

message.isNotEmpty: A message is required when the alert is enabled.
message.required: A message is required when the alert is enabled.
message.maxLength: The message must be 1000 characters or fewer.
